full_text:
Marquis of Haihun [Liu He] 海昏侯劉賀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Marquis of Haihun [Liu He] (海昏侯劉賀). Han dynasty emperor installed by Huo Guang. Deposed after 27 days and stricken from the record of emperors. Marquis of Haihun [Liu He] was affiliated with the Western Han Dynasty. Marquis of Haihun [Liu He] lived during the Former Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
